title: MBBS in Moldova for Indian Students | Fees & Eligibility

Moldova

Study MBBS in Moldova for Indian Students

Moldova is a great choice for Indian students who want to study MBBS abroad at an affordable cost. With globally recognized universities, low tuition fees, and quality education, Moldova offers a fantastic opportunity to become a doctor.

Universities In Moldova?

About Moldova

Moldova is a small and beautiful country in Eastern Europe, known for its rich culture, friendly people, and affordable cost of living. It has a strong education system, especially in the field of medicine. Many international students, including those from India, choose Moldova for MBBS because of its high-quality medical universities, modern facilities, and globally recognized degrees. The country is safe, welcoming, and provides a great environment for students to live and study.

Affordable Education

Moldova offers MBBS at a much lower cost compared to many other countries. Tuition fees are around $5,000 per year, making it a budget-friendly option for Indian students.

Globally Recognized Degree

Medical universities in Moldova are approved by WHO and MCI, allowing graduates to practice in India and other countries after passing the required exams.

English-Taught Programs

MBBS courses in Moldova are taught in English, so Indian students don’t have to learn a new language to study.

Eligibility

Eligibility of Study MBBS in Moldova for Indian Students

Indian students who want to study MBBS in Moldova must meet the following requirements

Educational Qualification

Must have completed 12th grade with Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and English as compulsory subjects.

Minimum Marks

A minimum of 50% aggregate in PCB (Physics, Chemistry, and Biology) is required.

English Proficiency

Students must be able to understand and communicate in English. Some universities may require an English proficiency test like TOEFL or IELTS.

NEET Requirement

While NEET is not required for admission to Moldovan universities, it is necessary for Indian students who want to practice in India after completing their MBBS.

University-Specific Requirements

Some universities may have additional requirements, so students should check with the university they are applying to.

Universities For MBBS in Moldova

Moldova

Is Moldova safe for Indian medical students?

Yes, Moldova is a safe and student-friendly country for Indian medical students. Here’s why:

  • Low Crime Rate – Moldova has a low crime rate, making it a secure place for international students.

  • Friendly Locals – People in Moldova are welcoming and helpful, making it easy for students to adjust.

  • Safe University Campuses – Medical universities have hostel facilities with proper security, ensuring student safety.

  • Good Healthcare System – Moldova has a well-developed healthcare system, so students have access to medical care if needed.

Overall, Moldova provides a safe and comfortable environment for Indian students to focus on their studies and build a successful medical career.

Advantages of Studying MBBS in Moldova

Studying MBBS in Moldova comes with many benefits, including affordable fees, globally recognized degrees, and a safe, student-friendly environment. Here’s why Moldova is a great choice for Indian students!

1. Affordable Tuition Fees

MBBS in Moldova costs around $5,000 per year, making it budget-friendly compared to other countries.

2. Globally Recognized Degree

Medical universities in Moldova are approved by WHO and MCI, allowing graduates to practice in India and other countries.

3. English-Taught Programs

No need to learn a new language; MBBS courses are conducted in English.

4. Simple Admission Process

No entrance exams required for admission (NEET is only needed for practicing in India).

5. Excellent Clinical Training

Hands-on practice in well-equipped hospitals.

6. Safe & Friendly Environment

Moldova is a peaceful country with a low crime rate, making it safe for international students.

7. Easy Visa Process

Hassle-free student visa application for Indian students.

8. Internship in Top Hospitals

Students gain real-world medical experience.

9. Part-Time Work Opportunities

Students can work part-time while studying, gaining practical experience and managing expenses.

10. Good Career Opportunities

After completing MBBS, students can appear for exams like FMGE (India), USMLE (USA), and PLAB (UK) to practice in different countries.

With affordable fees, quality education, and worldwide recognition, Moldova is an excellent choice for Indian students pursuing MBBS abroad.

LOAN

Education Loan for Indian Students to Study MBBS in Moldova

Indian students can apply for an education loan to study MBBS in Moldova. Here’s what you need to know:

  • Loan Availability – Many banks and financial institutions in India provide education loans for studying abroad.

  • Loan Amount – The loan amount depends on factors like university fees, living expenses, and parents' financial background.

  • Required Documents – Some key documents needed for the loan include:

  • NEET scorecard (if applicable)

  • University admission letter

  • Fee structure from the university

  • Parent’s income proof and property documents

  • Loan Process – The loan application process includes document submission, verification, and approval by the bank.

At Atlas Mentor, our counselors assist students in securing education loans for MBBS in Moldova, ensuring a smooth process.

F. A. Q

Frequently Asked Questions on MBBS in Moldova

Got questions about MBBS in Moldova? Here are the most common FAQs to help you understand the admission process, fees, recognition, safety, and more!

What is the duration of the MBBS course in Moldova?

The MBBS course in Moldova is 6 years, including 5 years of classroom and clinical training plus 1 year of internship.

Is MBBS in Moldova recognized in India?

Yes, MBBS degrees from Moldova are approved by WHO and MCI (now NMC). Indian students must clear the FMGE (Foreign Medical Graduate Examination) to practice in India.

What is the tuition fee for MBBS in Moldova?

The tuition fee for MBBS in Moldova is around €5,000 per year, making it an affordable option compared to other countries.

Do I need to learn a new language to study in Moldova?

No, MBBS courses in Moldova are taught in English, so Indian students do not need to learn a new language.

Is Moldova safe for Indian students?

Yes, Moldova is a safe country with a low crime rate, friendly locals, and secure university campuses, making it a great place for Indian students to study.
